display.purpose: Stat card values — short, scannable numbers with tight letter-spacing for impact.

title.purpose: Card titles, list item names, button labels.

body.purpose: Primary reading text — line length capped at 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Navigation bar labels, stat card labels, small metadata.

motion.name: ease-out-strong
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions — press scale, toggle animations, visibility changes.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Feedback animations — press scale, toggle check, button states.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Standard transitions — screen slides, visibility changes.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Expressive transitions — size changes, complex visibility.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Default layout — single column, bottom navigation.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Wider layout — two-column grids, adjusted container widths.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary call-to-action button. Used for log prayer, save, confirm, and primary navigation actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #064E3B; color: #FCFCF5; border: none; border-radius: 6px; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.3px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Primary Button (Dark)
components.description: Primary button for dark mode. Inverted fill for legibility on dark surfaces.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary-dark { background: #80BEA6; color: #0F1A14; border: none; border-radius: 6px; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.3px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-btn-primary-dark:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Default content container — flat, tonal surface with no shadow.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #EEF3E9; border-radius: 10px; padding: 16px; border: none; box-shadow: none; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-content { color: #141C12; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Input / Text Field
components.description: Filled text input with outline border. Used for settings, search, and text entry throughout the app.
components.css: .ds-input-container { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-input-label { font-size: 14px; color: #3E4839; } .ds-input { background: #EEF3E9; border: 1px solid #BEC8B7; border-radius: 6px; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #141C12; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #064E3B; border-width: 1.5px; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Bottom navigation bar with icon and label. Selected state uses Sacred Green with an indicator pill.
components.html:
Home
Stats
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; justify-content: space-around; align-items: center; background: #F7FAF4; padding: 8px 0; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; padding: 4px 16px; position: relative; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-selected::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: -4px; width: 32px; height: 4px; background: #064E3B; border-radius: 6px; opacity: 0.12; } .ds-nav-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.3px; color: #3E4839; } .ds-nav-selected .ds-nav-label { color: #064E3B; font-weight: 700; }

components.name: StatCard
components.description: Prayer statistic display — filled icon container, large value, description labels.
components.html:
42
This week
Qadaa Prayers
components.css: .ds-statcard { background: #EEF3E9; border-radius: 10px; padding: 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-statcard-icon { width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 6px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-statcard-value { font-size: 26px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.5px; line-height: 1; } .ds-statcard-sub { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #3E4839; } .ds-statcard-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; color: #6F7A69; }

components.name: ToggleTile
components.description: Qadaa prayer toggle — the signature devotional interaction. Check circle + prayer name + time in a card row.
components.html:
Fajr
5:12 AM
components.css: .ds-toggletile { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; background: #EEF3E9; border-radius: 10px; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; } .ds-toggletile-circle { width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: all 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-toggletile-empty { border: 2px solid #6F7A69; background: transparent; } .ds-toggletile-filled { border: 2px solid #064E3B; background: #064E3B; } .ds-toggletile-name { flex: 1; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: #141C12; } .ds-toggletile-done { color: #3E4839; text-decoration: line-through; } .ds-toggletile-time { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #6F7A69; }

narrative.overview:
The app feels like a quiet garden at dawn — calm, purposeful, rooted in tradition. Every interaction is a moment of stillness between the user and their practice. The deep green of Sacred Green anchors the system like mature foliage; warm off-white surfaces suggest natural light filtering through leaves. Nothing competes for attention — the interface recedes so the act of logging a prayer remains central.

This is a spiritual tool, not a product dashboard. The design rejects gamified mechanics (streaks-as-pressure, badges, leaderboards) as well as synthetic dark-neon-cyber aesthetics. Warmth, dignity, and devotional clarity govern every decision.
keyCharacteristics: Tonal layering replaces shadows — depth comes from surface containers, not drop shadows
One typeface (Plus Jakarta Sans) across all weights — clean, readable, quietly elegant
Color is purposeful and restrained — Sacred Green occupies 30% or less of any screen; neutrals carry the remainder
Motion is minimal and purposeful — state changes and feedback only, no choreography
Sacred geometry expressed through clean rounded corners and balanced spacing, not decorative patterns

rules.name: The Garden Tone Rule
rules.body: Every neutral carries a trace of green (chroma ≈ 0.005). Pure gray, cool blue-gray, and warm beige are all forbidden — the system's warmth comes from this consistent undertone.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Sacred Green occupies 30% or less of any screen. Its infrequency gives it weight. Buttons, selected nav items, and small icon fills are its natural home; large background swaths are not.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: No font switching. All hierarchy is expressed through weight (400 / 500 / 600 / 700) and size, not typeface changes.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. No shadows — depth is communicated through the tonal container stack.

dos: Do use Sacred Green on 30% or less of any screen. Its rarity is its power.
Do use the tonal container stack for elevation instead of shadows.
Do use Plus Jakarta Sans for all text — one family, all weights.
Do keep motion restrained — state changes and feedback only, no choreographed entrances.
Do ensure every neutral carries a green trace (the Garden Tone Rule).
Do use flat cards with container backgrounds rather than bordered or shadowed cards.
donts: Don't use gamification patterns — no badges, achievements, leaderboards, or streaks-as-pressure. The app is devotional, not competitive.
Don't use dark mode with purple gradients, neon accents, or glassmorphism. Stay warm and natural.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing (easeOutBack, spring animations). Use the custom ease-out cubic bezier.
Don't use gradient text for any purpose. Solid color only.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px as accent). Use full borders, background fills, or nothing.
Don't use nested cards. Cards are the lazy answer.
Don't add decorative patterns, geometric overlays, or Islamic pattern motifs as background elements. The interface stays clean and undistracting.
Don't use em dashes in copy. Use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses.
Don't use material dynamic color theming (ColorScheme.fromSeed). The palette is hand-tuned and intentional.
